texto: Broad-Based Education:Reed College at that time offered perhaps the best calligraphy instruction in the country.… I decided to take a calligraphy class to learn how to do this.… Itwas beautiful, historical, artistically subtle in a way that science can’t capture, and I found it fascinating. None of this had even a hope of any practicalapplication in my life. But ten years later, when we were designing the first Macintosh computer, it all came back to me.—Commencement address, Stanford University,June 12, 2005
explicacao: Citação de George Beahm sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Broad-Based Education:Reed College at that time offered perhaps the best calligraphy instruction …” articula educacao, biography, inspiracional em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e viagem.
